zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Lascelles Jackson於1420年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親William de Lascelles60歲，母親Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby44歲。他於大約1435年與Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth在英國越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年在英國越可爾約克享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Lascelles Jackson于1420年1月1日出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲William de Lascelles60岁，母亲Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby44岁。他于大约1435年与Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth在英国越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1505年在英国越可爾約克享年85岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Jackson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: patronymic from Jack . In North America, this surname has absorbed other patronymics beginning with J- in various European languages, in particular those derived from equivalents or short forms and other derivatives of the personal name Jacob , e.g. Norwegian Jacobsen or Jakobsen and, in some cases, Slovenian Jakše (from a derivative of the personal name Jakob ). This surname is also very common among African Americans (see also 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Jackson (or Andrew Jackson), adopted in honor of Andrew Jackson, the 7th president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in many cases probably for the same reason.

History: This extremely common British name was brought over by numerous different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One forebear was the father and namesake of the seventh US president, Andrew Jackson, who migrated to SC from Carrickfergus in the north of Ireland in 1765. The Confederate General Thomas ‘Stonewall’ Jackson came from VA, where his great-grandfather John, likewise of Scotch–Irish stock, had settled after emigrating to America in 1748.

variants.name: Jack
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Jak, Jakke, Jagge, Jake, Jeke, Jegge, a Picard-Flemish denasalized form of Old Picard and Middle Dutch Janke, a pet form of Jan (see John ). It was introduced by Flemings and Picards into Norman and Anglo-Norman usage, whence it became a common English and Scottish pet form of John. Although the surname is mainly Scottish in distribution, it also occurs in England, though the more common form there is Jackson .

English: occasionally perhaps from a Middle English borrowing of the Old French personal name Jacque(s) (James). However, it is uncertain whether English Jack was ever used as an alternative to James.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Jack (see 1 above) as a surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Lascelles Jackson was born on 1 January 1420, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Lascelles, was 60 and his mother, Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby, was 44. He married Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth about 1435, in York, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1505, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Lascelles Jackson est né le 1 janvier 1420, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Lascelles, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth environ 1435, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1505, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Lascelles Jackson am 1. Januar 1420 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Lascelles 60 und seine Mutter Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby 44. Er hat um 1435 in York, Yorkshire, England Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1505 im Alter von 85 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lascelles Jackson è nato il il 1 gennaio 1420 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Lascelles, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth circa 1435, nel York, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1505, nel York, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Lascelles Jacksonが1420年1月1日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Lascellesは60歳，母Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnbyは44歳であった。約1435年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでAnne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Lascelles Jackson(이)가 1420년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Lascelles(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1435년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lascelles Jackson nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1420, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Lascelles, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth aproximadamente 1435, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1505, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Lascelles Jackson родился 1 января 1420 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Lascelles было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel Elizabeth Barnby, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth около 1435 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1505 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
